```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.95em;align-items:stretch;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.65em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:50%;background-image:url('figs/pingfan-hu.png');background-size:cover;background-position:center;border:1.5px solid #DCE9FA;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(58,125,201,0.15);"></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;white-space:nowrap;">Pingfan Hu</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    PhD Candidate, EMSE<br>
    Systems Engineering
   </div>
   <a class="instructor-link instructor-link--blue" href="http://pingfanhu.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="margin-top:auto;">pingfanhu.com ↗</a>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.65em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:50%;background-image:url('figs/john-helveston.png');background-size:cover;background-position:center;border:1.5px solid #FEF5E7;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(196,136,26,0.15);"></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;white-space:nowrap;">Dr. John Helveston</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    Associate Professor, EMSE<br>
    Director, Data Analytics
   </div>
   <a class="instructor-link instructor-link--gold" href="https://www.jhelvy.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="margin-top:auto;">jhelvy.com ↗</a>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
